title: Compass Coords
description: A simple mod that let you see coordinates when a compass is hold, both main and off hand
body:
This mod is as simple as it sounds.

Let you see your coordinates and direction in the bottom left corner.

 

Pretty useful if you want to play with reducedDebugInfo but still have a fair way to get coords.

 

By default, the Y coordinate is not displayed.

Needed on Client-side only, can't be installed on the server.
